goal: Native iOS application that enables users to track time spent on development projects through both manual entries and seamless Jira integration via configured API endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: The application launches cleanly on a simulator and presents a main dashboard with a working timer and project list.
Users can manually create a custom project entry with a name, start and stop the timer, and view elapsed time in a persisted list.
The Settings screen accepts a Jira base URL, username, and API key, stores them securely, and requires them for all API operations.
The application fetches projects from Jira API automatically when credentials are provided.
Time logs are stored locally on the device with SwiftData persistence.
Export functionality generates a summary report of tracked time.
All data is stored locally with no cloud dependency or telemetry.
